cursed_forest.name: Cursed Forest
cursed_forest.description: Your dying homeland. The trees wither and darkness spreads.

borderlands.name: The Borderlands
borderlands.description: Lawless territory between elven and human lands. Bandits roam freely.

route_a.name: Main Road
route_a.description: Well-traveled but heavily patrolled by bandits

route_b.name: Forest Path
route_b.description: Safer but longer and harder to find food

human_kingdom.name: Kingdom of Arathor
human_kingdom.description: Human lands. They are suspicious of elven refugees.

mountain_pass.name: Frostpeak Pass
mountain_pass.description: Treacherous mountain crossing. The air is thin and cold.

ancient_ruins.name: Ruins of Kal'Thalas
ancient_ruins.description: Once a great elven city, now abandoned for centuries.

silverwood_vale.name: Silverwood Vale
silverwood_vale.description: Your destination. A hidden valley where the old magic still thrives.
